## Documentation and Compatibility

- [ ] Relevant `/docs` files updated
- [ ] Current monthly project log updated for important work
- [ ] Project-file compatibility considered
- [ ] Undo/redo behavior considered
- [ ] Preview/export parity considered

## Safety and Provenance

- [ ] No secrets, private data, or machine-specific paths
- [ ] New fixtures are synthetic or explicitly licensed
- [ ] New third-party assets/dependencies include license provenance
